HomePage.resume: I'm an aspiring security engineer who genuinely enjoys designing network infrastructure and running servers hands-on. I've built multi-site infrastructure spanning on-prem virtualization (KVM, VMware), Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS, and automated operations with User-Data-based backup and deployment pipelines and Auto Scaling. What I enjoy most is hunting for vulnerabilities on Kali Linux with Wireshark, Nmap, and Metasploit, and I'm comfortable standing up and hardening servers on Ubuntu and Rocky Linux while managing MariaDB and MySQL. I hold to responsible security principles and keep growing, hoping to help build a safer digital world.

services.title: I want to work in Security
services.sub_title: Aspiring systems engineer passionate about infrastructure and security

main_card.title: I want to grow in security
main_card.description: I've taken on real infrastructure and security projects firsthand, and also built React web, C# desktop, and Flutter mobile apps. On that foundation I want to grow into a security expert and help strengthen organizations' security.

pentest.title: Systems Engineering
pentest.description: Hybrid cloud infrastructure design and operations using KVM, Hyper-V, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS

network.title: Network & System Security
network.description: Traffic analysis and penetration testing with Wireshark and Nmap on Kali Linux; server setup and administration on Ubuntu and Rocky Linux

1.title: Virtualization-Based VM Academy Infrastructure & Security
1.description: Designed and deployed a multi-site hybrid cloud infrastructure connecting four locations (Seoul HQ, Yeongdeungpo, Incheon, Gyeonggi) via VPN using KVM, Hyper-V, VMware (ESXi), Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS. Integrated on-premises virtualization with AWS multi-VPC architecture, configuring AD/DNS/DHCP, HAProxy load balancing, and Auto Scaling per site.

2.title: High-Availability Infrastructure for Disaster Recovery
2.description: Designed and built an enterprise-grade high-availability infrastructure connecting head office and branches via VPN, with OSPF-based hierarchical routing, HSRP gateway redundancy, and MySQL Master-Slave replication to ensure service continuity during failures.

3.title: Design Sharing & Community Website
3.description: A platform for designers to share their work and build community. Features portfolio uploads, likes, comments, and real-time chat for communication. Built with Firebase for real-time database and Zustand for state management to provide a smooth user experience.
3.content: A comprehensive platform for designers that integrates work sharing, community, and portfolio features.

4.title: Personal Portfolio Website
4.description: A modern and responsive personal portfolio website for developers. Features dark mode, multi-language support, animation effects, and effectively showcases projects and tech stack.
4.content: A portfolio website that effectively showcases developer skills and projects.

5.title: E-commerce Shopping Mall
5.description: The first e-commerce website I developed, built with PHP and MySQL. Implemented basic shopping mall features including product management, shopping cart, order system, and member management. Also includes admin panel and payment systems (PayPal, credit cards).
5.content: My first shopping mall project developed while learning the basics of e-commerce.

6.title: Course Registration App UI/UX Redesign
6.description: A mobile application that improves the complex UI of existing school course registration systems to be more user-friendly. Built with Flutter for cross-platform support and intuitive interface. Includes timetable visualization, search filtering, and favorites functionality.
6.content: A mobile app redesign project to improve students' course registration experience.

7.title: Database Backup Program
7.description: A desktop application responsible for automatic backup and restoration of enterprise databases. Developed with C# and .NET Framework, includes scheduling, compression, and encryption features. Supports various databases (MySQL, SQL Server, PostgreSQL).
7.content: A professional tool for secure backup and restoration of enterprise data.

10.title: AR Combined with Blockchain Technology
10.description: A research proposal for a decentralized platform that combines AR (Augmented Reality) with blockchain technology to strengthen trust and security. Presents an augmented-reality blockchain for AR commercialization, DID-based decentralized identity authentication, and a hybrid token model, deriving differentiators through analysis of a similar case (Scanetchain) and a failure case (Steemit).
10.content: A research proposal for a decentralized platform combining AR and blockchain, with analysis of similar and failed cases.

11.title: IoT Security Vulnerabilities & Countermeasures
11.description: A research report analyzing the security vulnerabilities of rapidly expanding IoT environments in the hyper-connected society. Covers the OWASP IoT Top 10 vulnerabilities, device hacking scenarios exploiting the CoAP protocol, and attack techniques targeting firmware, routers, and CCTV, then proposes step-by-step countermeasures including big-data (Hadoop) based blacklist screening.
11.content: A research report organizing the security threats, attack scenarios, and countermeasures of hyper-connected IoT environments.

12.title: How a Stack Overflow Occurs
12.description: A research note analyzing how a stack buffer overflow occurs at the assembly level. Explains the difference between MOV and LEA instructions, the set conditions of carry and overflow flags, the function prologue/epilogue (ebp, esp, SFP, RET) and stack frame structure, and disassembled assembly code analysis to describe the mechanism of a stack overflow.
12.content: A reverse-engineering study analyzing how a stack buffer overflow occurs at the assembly level.

resume.paragraf_1: Hello! Thank you for visiting my portfolio. My name is Baek Seunghak. I studied Computer Engineering at Hallym University, building a solid foundation in computer science and systems. I have a deep passion for web security and penetration testing, and I am actively working toward a career in the cybersecurity field.
resume.paragraf_2: My focus is on network security, vulnerability analysis, and building server infrastructure. I've worked across on-prem virtualization (KVM, VMware), Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS to build multi-site infrastructure, and automated operations with User-Data-based backup/deployment and Auto Scaling. I run network analysis and security testing with Wireshark, Nmap, and Metasploit on Kali Linux, and have hands-on experience building servers on Ubuntu and Rocky Linux and managing MariaDB and MySQL.
resume.paragraf_3: I believe that staying curious and continuously learning are essential in the ever-evolving security landscape. I am dedicated to responsible security practices. I look forward to contributing to a security-focused team, strengthening infrastructure security, and growing as a professional in the information security industry!
